_comment: Two example records showing the same schema in different enrichment states.

bulk_after_market_mapper._comment: Created by Market Mapper. Volume filled, api_fit basic pass. ICP/outreach/demo all null — Scout hasn't run yet.

number_verification.reason: SMS OTP confirmed for account registration and 2FA

sim_swap.reason: C2C fraud exposure in payment flows

on_demand_fully_enriched._comment: Created on-demand ('tengo reunión con Glovo mañana'). Scout + Analyst ran immediately. Demo pending.

volume.source: Glovo most downloaded food delivery app Spain 2024 (Statista), global 100M+ orders/year

number_verification.reason: SMS OTP at registration and periodic re-auth; high fraud on new accounts

sim_swap.reason: Payment fraud risk in delivery transactions

kyc_match.reason: Consumer app, no regulated identity requirement

device_status.reason: No explicit connectivity requirement in current flows

use_cases: Silent Authentication replacing SMS OTP at app registration
Number Verification to block fake courier accounts
SIM Swap check before high-value order payment authorization
why_now: Glovo gig-worker court ruling in Spain (2021 onwards) increases identity verification pressure on courier onboarding
Active fraud on Glovo payment flows documented in Spanish consumer press (2024)
Delivery market consolidation — Glovo acquired Just Eat Spain operations creating larger combined user base

signals.fraud_or_ato: Consumer fraud reports and chargebacks documented in Spanish press 2024
signals.sms_otp_dependency: SMS OTP confirmed at app registration; 2FA on payment method changes
signals.auth_stack: AWS Cognito inferred from job postings; mobile-first iOS + Android
signals.hiring: Security Engineer - Identity & Access Management posted Madrid (LinkedIn, Jan 2026)
signals.sim_swap: No direct incident, but payment tokenization stack exposure
signals.regulatory: Riders' Law (Ley Rider) compliance and courier KYC obligations

icp.first_outreach_angle: Glovo's fraud exposure in courier onboarding + payment auth is the entry point; Number Verification eliminates virtual-number account farms at zero friction for real users

outreach.angle: Silent auth para eliminar fraude en onboarding de repartidores y cuentas de pago
outreach.cta: Piloto de Number Verification en flujo de registro de repartidores — 30 días, sin cambio de UX
